prompt: Generate a concentric donut chart utilizing the layered structure from image 2. Apply the bold segment outlines and prominent percentage labels characteristic of image 1. Include a clear, simple title above the chart.
prompt_refined: Generate a concentric donut chart. Utilize the two-layered structure from image 2. For all segments across both concentric rings, apply bold, thick black outlines, as characteristic of image 1. Place prominent percentage labels inside each segment; these should be large, centrally positioned, and highly visible, similar to the white labels in image 1. Include a clear, simple title centrally above the chart, mirroring the style and placement from image 1.
objects: Bold, thick black outlines on all segments
Chart title positioned centrally above the chart
